task_completion.description: Verify that a chart window for the instrument 'AAPL' has been opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window is visible with 'AAPL' in the title bar, tab, or data series configuration window.

task_completion.description: Verify that the chart bar type is set to Point & Figure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart visually displays columns of X's and O's instead of standard candlesticks/bars, or the Data Series configuration window shows 'PointAndFigure' selected as the Type.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Point & Figure Box size is set to 2 and Reversal is set to 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Series configuration window shows Box size = 2 and Reversal = 3, or the chart header/legend explicitly displays these parameters (e.g., 'PointAndFigure 2 3').

task_completion.description: Verify that a Simple Moving Average (SMA) indicator has been added to the chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An SMA line is visible overlaying the chart data, or the Indicators configuration window shows 'SMA' in the 'Configured' list for the chart.

task_completion.description: Verify that the SMA indicator period is configured to 20.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Indicator properties window shows Period = 20 for the SMA, or the chart legend/header displays 'SMA (20)'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workspace has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Workspace' dialog is visible, a 'Save' action is being clicked in the Workspaces menu of the Control Center, or the workspace name in the bottom right corner of the Control Center lacks a gray asterisk (indicating no unsaved changes).

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure the chart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show NinjaTrader 8 menus, Data Series windows, and Indicator windows being used, rather than a terminal or text editor modifying XML workspace files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the chart is rendering actual data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart window shows actual X and O columns with axes populated with prices and dates, not a blank window or an error message.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the expected configuration into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no Notepad or text editor windows open containing the task parameters as a shortcut to bypass actual software configuration.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Instrument: AAPL. Bar Type: PointAndFigure (Point & Figure charts visually display columns of X's and O's). Box Size: 2. Reversal: 3. Indicator: Simple Moving Average (SMA). Period: 20. Workspace Directory: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces. Look for 'SMA (20)' and 'PointAndFigure 2 3' in the chart headers or configuration menus.
